_comment: Copy this file to xylem.config.json (in this same install/ directory) and fill in your machine-specific values. xylem.config.json is gitignored and NEVER committed. Every key below can also be supplied as an environment variable of the same name; environment variables take precedence over this file. Only fill in the servers you actually run — a server whose required values are missing is skipped, not written half-configured.
_local_stdio_servers: Absolute paths to each cloned server script, plus its per-server env values.
_same_tree: CONTEXT_KEEPER_PROJECT, CAMBIUM_REPO, and AGENTSYNC_REPO must all point at the SAME clone (one working tree). cambium reads context-keeper's .context/ from CAMBIUM_REPO/.context/ and agentsync's coordination branch from CAMBIUM_REPO — if CONTEXT_KEEPER_PROJECT and CAMBIUM_REPO diverge, distill() silently captures nothing from context-keeper.
_coordination_branch: The agentsync coordination branch is named by two keys that MUST match: agentsync writes it (AGENTSYNC_BRANCH), cambium's distill reads it (CAMBIUM_AGENTSYNC_BRANCH). Both default to 'agentsync'; set both together if you change it, or distill reads the wrong branch and captures no coordination events.
_remote_http_workers: The full connector URL for each Worker. The token is the last path segment — the whole URL is the secret, and the Worker authenticates on that path token alone (it never reads an Authorization/Bearer header). This is why it lives here (untracked), not in servers.json.
_optional: Uncomment / set any of these to override defaults. XYLEM_PYTHON forces a specific interpreter for the stdio servers (e.g. a venv); otherwise python3/python on PATH is used.
